name: Zucchini Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Pillsbury Crescent Rolls, Reduced Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the crescent rolls in the pie pan to form a crust.
2. Saute the zucchini and onion in a small amount of balsamic vinegar for 10 minutes.
3. Mix the eggs with the shredded cheese and add it to the zucchini mixture along with the spices.
4. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes.
